note: Lightweight catalog only. Individual per-function workbooks (F001_....xlsx ... F060_....xlsx) referenced by the Workbook Filename column were NOT provided and do not exist on disk as of Session 0 -- see OWNER_DECISIONS.md.

recommendedBuildSequence.scope: Global requirements, repository map, data inventory, provider inventory, threat model, migration/rollback plan.

recommendedBuildSequence.exitRequirement: Tenant isolation, sessions, roles, audit, settings, retention, recovery
Dashboard -> request -> triage -> scope -> approval -> payment -> work -> closure
Website registry, changes, maintenance, monitoring, renewals, reports
Readiness, reminders, reports, analytics, communication, integrations
Optional drafts only after secure non-AI workflows are complete

functions.name: Customer Organization Provisioning
functions.objective: Create and maintain the tenant boundary that represents each customer business and owns all of its users, projects, tickets, documents, assets, plans, and activity.

functions.name: Customer Invitation & Account Activation
functions.objective: Invite approved customer users and securely activate accounts without exposing temporary credentials.

functions.name: Authentication & Session Management
functions.objective: Provide secure sign-in, sign-out, session validation, and session revocation for customers, technicians, and administrators.

functions.name: Password Recovery & Credential Changes
functions.objective: Allow users to recover access and change credentials securely without enabling account takeover.

functions.name: Role-Based Access Control
functions.objective: Authorize every action and record using explicit roles, permissions, organization scope, and least privilege.

functions.name: User Profile, Preferences & Accessibility Settings
functions.objective: Let users maintain personal details and experience preferences without weakening identity controls.

functions.name: Terms, Privacy & Consent Acknowledgment
functions.objective: Capture provable acceptance of current legal terms and optional communication consents.

functions.name: Audit Trail & Security Event Logging
functions.objective: Create a tamper-resistant operational and security history for important customer, staff, and system actions.

functions.name: Customer Dashboard
functions.objective: Give each customer a concise, role-aware overview of active services, requests, approvals, documents, renewals, and website/IT health.

functions.name: Service & Project Record Management
functions.objective: Maintain the authoritative record of each website, IT, security, or recurring-service engagement.

functions.name: Global Search, Filters & Saved Views
functions.objective: Help authorized users find relevant tickets, projects, documents, assets, messages, and customers without exposing unauthorized records.

functions.name: Notification Center & Delivery Preferences
functions.objective: Deliver actionable in-app and email notifications for service activity while respecting user preferences and urgency.

functions.name: Secure Customer-Technician Messaging
functions.objective: Provide a secure, auditable conversation channel tied to the customer relationship and service records.

functions.name: Document Library & Controlled Downloads
functions.objective: Store and deliver customer proposals, agreements, invoices, receipts, reports, and handoff documents with controlled access.

functions.name: File & Media Asset Upload Management
functions.objective: Safely accept, validate, store, organize, and reuse customer images, logos, PDFs, and permitted support files.

functions.name: Customer Approval Inbox
functions.objective: Give customers one place to review and act on scopes, change orders, deliverables, documents, and other approval requests.

functions.name: Unified Activity Timeline
functions.objective: Show a chronological, permission-filtered history across projects, tickets, approvals, documents, payments, and service events.

functions.name: Knowledge Base & Guided Help
functions.objective: Provide plain-language help articles and contextual guidance that reduce repetitive support while preserving personal service.

functions.name: Support & Change Ticket Submission
functions.objective: Let customers submit structured website changes, IT issues, questions, and service requests with the minimum necessary friction.

functions.name: Intelligent Ticket Triage & Service Routing
functions.objective: Classify incoming requests into the correct service, queue, and next-step workflow using rules first and optional AI assistance.

functions.name: Priority, Impact & Urgency Assessment
functions.objective: Calculate and communicate ticket priority consistently from business impact, urgency, safety, security, and service entitlement.

functions.name: Ticket Assignment & Technician Work Queue
functions.objective: Route work to authorized staff and provide a focused queue that supports ownership, handoff, and workload visibility.

functions.name: Ticket Lifecycle & Status Workflow
functions.objective: Manage ticket progression through defined, auditable states without confusing customers or technicians.

functions.name: Ticket Conversation & Attachments
functions.objective: Keep customer and technician communication, clarification, evidence, and files directly connected to the service request.

functions.name: Internal Notes, Time & Cost Tracking
functions.objective: Give staff a private work record for diagnostics, decisions, time, expenses, and profitability without exposing it to customers.

functions.name: Scope of Work & Estimate Generation
functions.objective: Turn an approved request into a clear, versioned scope, assumptions, exclusions, estimated price, and customer decision package.

functions.name: Change Order Approval & Rejection
functions.objective: Control additions or changes to an approved project so scope, cost, schedule impact, and customer consent remain explicit.

functions.name: Payment Request & Payment Status Reconciliation
functions.objective: Create customer-specific payment requests, direct customers to Square securely, and reconcile payment state to the correct scope, project, or subscription.

functions.name: Ticket Closure, Confirmation & Reopen
functions.objective: Close completed work with a clear resolution, customer confirmation, follow-up window, and controlled reopen process.

functions.name: Satisfaction Survey & Review Request
functions.objective: Collect service feedback and respectfully request public reviews only after appropriate completed work.

functions.name: Website Profile & Ownership Registry
functions.objective: Maintain a structured record of every managed website, domain, hosting arrangement, ownership responsibility, and connected service.

functions.name: Website Content Change Request
functions.objective: Provide a simple, structured way for customers to request website text, image, hours, service, staff, pricing, or page changes.

functions.name: Visual Screenshot Annotation
functions.objective: Let customers identify an exact visual area of a website and attach a precise comment to reduce misunderstanding.

functions.name: Website Maintenance Checklist
functions.objective: Standardize recurring website maintenance tasks and prove what was checked or completed.

functions.name: Website Health Monitoring
functions.objective: Summarize the current operational health of a managed website using understandable, verifiable checks.

functions.name: Uptime & Incident Alerting
functions.objective: Detect sustained website unavailability and coordinate customer-safe incident communication.

functions.name: Domain, SSL & Subscription Renewal Tracking
functions.objective: Track important website-related expiration and renewal dates so customers receive timely, non-alarmist reminders.

functions.name: Contact Form Test & Delivery Monitoring
functions.objective: Verify that managed website contact forms accept submissions and reach the intended destination without creating spam or customer confusion.

functions.name: Broken Link & Content Quality Scan
functions.objective: Identify broken internal/external links and basic content-quality issues without overloading customer sites.

functions.name: Performance & Accessibility Snapshot
functions.objective: Provide periodic, plain-language snapshots of mobile performance and accessibility signals without presenting them as guarantees or formal certifications.

functions.name: Backup & Restore Point Tracking
functions.objective: Record where website source, content, assets, databases, and configuration are backed up and whether restore points are usable.

functions.name: Monthly Website Care Report
functions.objective: Generate an understandable, evidence-based customer report showing maintenance performed, website health, issues, changes, and recommendations.

functions.name: Technology Asset Inventory
functions.objective: Maintain a practical inventory of customer computers, printers, network devices, software, and business technology without collecting unnecessary secrets.

functions.name: IT Support Request & Remote/On-Site Classification
functions.objective: Collect enough information to route computer, network, printer, account, and software issues to remote, on-site, or safety-conscious handling.

functions.name: Service History & Technician Work Log
functions.objective: Preserve a customer-visible service history and a more detailed internal work record for each technology asset and engagement.

functions.name: Security Readiness Assessment
functions.objective: Guide small businesses through a plain-language assessment of foundational account, device, network, backup, and policy readiness.

functions.name: Account Protection & MFA Checklist
functions.objective: Track whether critical business accounts have MFA, recovery, ownership, and offboarding controls without storing credentials.

functions.name: Warranty, License & Device Lifecycle Reminders
functions.objective: Help customers plan renewals, warranties, replacements, and end-of-support events for managed technology.

functions.name: Service Plan, Entitlement & Usage Tracking
functions.objective: Represent what each customer plan includes, excludes, limits, and consumes so service decisions are consistent and profitable.

functions.name: Pricing, Discount & Bundle Rules Engine
functions.objective: Provide one authoritative, testable source for base prices, add-ons, discounts, bundles, taxes, and estimate labels across the website and portal.

functions.name: Admin Operations Dashboard & Work Queue
functions.objective: Give the owner and authorized staff a secure operational view of leads, customers, tickets, approvals, payments, renewals, incidents, and workload.

functions.name: Subscription & Billing Plan Management
functions.objective: Manage recurring service-plan enrollment, provider subscription status, plan changes, cancellation, and customer-facing billing history.

functions.name: Reporting, PDF/CSV Export & Customer Reports
functions.objective: Generate secure operational and customer-facing reports from permission-filtered, versioned data.

functions.name: Operational Analytics & Conversion Metrics
functions.objective: Measure lead, quote, ticket, plan, service, and operational outcomes without invasive tracking or exposing sensitive customer content.

functions.name: Email & Communication Template Automation
functions.objective: Create consistent, branded, versioned transactional communications without allowing templates to leak data or promise unsupported service terms.

functions.name: System Settings, Feature Flags & Content Configuration
functions.objective: Centralize non-secret business configuration, feature rollout, support text, service areas, and operational thresholds with safe validation and audit.

functions.name: Integrations, Webhooks & API Connectivity
functions.objective: Connect approved third-party systems through secure, observable, replaceable interfaces.

functions.name: Data Retention, Export & Deletion Requests
functions.objective: Apply documented retention rules and respond safely to customer requests for access, correction, export, or deletion.

functions.name: Platform Backup, Recovery & Continuity
functions.objective: Protect the Business Care Hub's own data and provide a tested recovery path for application, configuration, files, and critical integrations.

functions.name: AI-Assisted Ticket Structuring & Drafting
functions.objective: Use AI to reduce administrative work by structuring requests and drafting content while keeping humans responsible for decisions, promises, and publication.
